org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.orchestrators

Class MonitorOrchestrator

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.orchestrators.MonitorOrchestrator
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable

    public class MonitorOrchestrator
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.lang.AutoCloseable
    Listen to reports published to the ERSAP data-ring.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      MonitorOrchestrator()
      Create a new monitor orchestrator to a default ERSAP data-ring in the localhost.
      MonitorOrchestrator(DataRingAddress address)
      Create a new monitor orchestrator to the given ERSAP data-ring.

      Listen DPE reports.

      • MonitorOrchestrator

        public MonitorOrchestrator()
        Create a new monitor orchestrator to a default ERSAP data-ring in the localhost.

      • MonitorOrchestrator

        public MonitorOrchestrator(DataRingAddress address)
        Create a new monitor orchestrator to the given ERSAP data-ring.

        address - the address of the ERSAP data-ring

        public void listenDpeReports(DpeReportHandler handler)
                      throws ErsapException
        Listen DPE reports.
        Parameters:
        handler - DPE report handler
        Throws:
        ErsapException - if the subscription could not be started

      • listenDpeReports

        public void listenDpeReports(java.lang.String session,
                             DpeReportHandler handler)
                      throws ErsapException
        Listen DPE reports.
        Parameters:
        session - DPE session
        handler - DPE report handler
        Throws:
        ErsapException - if the subscription could not be started

      • listenEngineReports

        public void listenEngineReports(EngineReportHandler handler)
                         throws ErsapException
        Listen engine reports.
        Parameters:
        handler - data-ring event handler
        Throws:
        ErsapException - if the subscription could not be started

      • listenEngineReports

        public void listenEngineReports(DataRingTopic ringTopic,
                                EngineReportHandler handler)
                         throws ErsapException
        Listen engine reports.
        Parameters:
        ringTopic - data-ring topic
        handler - data-ring event handler
        Throws:
        ErsapException - if the subscription could not be started
